content_gaps: Most pages focus on general spiritual meanings of moths (transformation, faith) but lack specific mythological stories or folklore from different cultures.
There is very little content that connects the symbolism directly to the craft of jewelry making—materials, design choices, and how they enhance the moth's meaning.
The distinction and comparative symbolism between different types of moths (beyond Luna and Death's Head) is largely unexplored.
While 'transformation' is mentioned frequently, the psychological aspect of this—shadow work, embracing the unknown, navigating darkness—is only touched upon superficially by most commercial sites.
